name: Intellivision
description: Mattel's classic home console platform and Atari 2600 rival, known for keypad overlays, sports games, and early voice/strategy experiments.

eras.title: Mattel Electronics Era
eras.description: Original Intellivision period under Mattel, defined by sports, strategy, overlays, and direct competition with Atari.

eras.title: Legacy Revival Era
eras.description: Modern Atari-owned revival period after acquisition of the Intellivision brand and library.
